data.title: Skanska promotes Jenny Chandler Graham to EVP - Chief Strategy Officer and Tieg Murray Rustam to VP - Market Strategy.
data.description: Skanska, a prominent global development and construction company, has recently made key promotions within its U.S. building operations. Jenny Chandler Graham has been elevated to Executive Vice President – Chief Strategy Officer, while Tieg Murray Rustam has been appointed as Vice President – Market Strategy and Creative Services at Skanska USA Building. In her new role as CSO, Graham will spearhead the business unit's strategic planning, internal alignment efforts, and further initiatives. The changes are effective immediately and reflect the company's commitment to enhancing its operations.

data.title: Floating offshore wind energy market set to expand at 60.1% CAGR to $18 billion by 2030 due to cost reduction, R&D, green hydrogen, and regulatory support.
data.description: A report on the Floating Offshore Wind Energy Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market is projected to increase significantly from $1.7 billion in 2025 to reach $18 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 60.1% during the period from 2025 to 2030. The analysis in the report covers segmentation of the global market by components, floating platform technology, depth, turbine rating, and country.

data.title: Citadel Completions in Lake Charles, LA, redelivered a VIP Boeing 757 for an NBA team, raising the luxury and performance bar.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Lake Charles, Louisiana, Citadel Completions showcased their commitment to providing top-notch services in the professional sports industry. Renowned for their excellence, the company unveiled a fully reconfigured travel arrangement for teams, setting new standards in the industry. This move signifies the firm's dedication to ensuring the highest quality in every facet of the game. The attention to detail exhibited by Citadel Completions is reflective of the demanding nature of the sports world, where precision and excellence are paramount. The revamped travel accommodations are testament to the company's unwavering pursuit of perfection in sports logistics, reinforcing their position as a leader in the field.

data.title: Nike exceeded expectations, turning $1.5B tariff hit into performance gain causing share to rise.
data.description: Nike Inc (NYSE: NKE) has surpassed Wall Street's predictions, turning a potential $1.5 billion hit from tariffs into a testament to its successful recovery. Despite facing a $1.5 billion annual loss from Donald Trump-era tariffs, which is a 50% increase from previous estimates, primarily due to a 20% tariff on Vietnam-made footwear, the sportswear giant's performance has delighted investors. This turnaround narrative has propelled NKE stock upwards during Thursday's trading session, illustrating that positive company developments can overshadow negative external factors. For more details on Nike's resilient performance, make sure to track NKE stock updates.

data.title: FOX News tops all news brands with 1.1B YouTube views in Q3, marking fourth consecutive quarter at number one.
data.description: FOX News has maintained its position as the top news brand on YouTube for the fourth quarter in a row, according to data from Emplifi. In the third quarter of 2025, FOX News Media garnered an impressive 1.1 billion video views on the platform. This marked a significant lead over competitors in the news industry.
